task: Create or update canonical decision documentation before making architecture-affecting changes.
rules: Search canonical/ before changing features, routes, generators, Manifest behavior, app wiring, integrations, CI, auth, tenants, or data models.

Before adding any new entry, cd into canonical/ and run treex (it operates on cwd, ignores path args). Do not grep to check whether something already exists — a differently-named existing entry will not match and you will create a duplicate or misnamed unit.
If a matching canonical unit exists, obey Ryan Final Decision over current repo patterns.
If code disagrees with a final canonical decision, report drift instead of copying the drift.
If ambiguity exists, create or update the relevant canonical unit using canonical/_templates/canonical-unit.md.
Fill in all factual sections that can be proven from repo evidence.
Leave Ryan Final Decision as NEEDS-RYAN unless Ryan explicitly decided it.
Use UNKNOWN, NONE, or SOURCE REQUIRED instead of guessing.
Record practical options with real app impact.
Do not implement a second source of truth to work around uncertainty.
